hero.title: Leadership Rooted in Service
hero.subtitle: Building Opportunities for Every Community in Zamfara State.

page.hero_desc: A lifetime of dedication to the prosperity, peace, and progress of Zamfara State.
page.timeline_subtitle: Milestones in a career dedicated to community development.

vision.section_sub: A comprehensive plan to uplift our communities through strategic investments in key sectors.

page.hero_desc: We are not just promising change; we are presenting a detailed, actionable blueprint to transform Zamfara into a hub of prosperity, security, and opportunity for all.
page.priorities_subtitle: The specific actions we will champion in the House of Representatives from Day One.
priorities: Establishing a state-wide Technical & Vocational Education Training (TVET) fund.
Subsidizing modern farming equipment for registered agricultural cooperatives.
Upgrading 50 primary healthcare centers to operate 24/7 with solar power.
Providing zero-interest micro-loans for market women and small business owners.
Creating three regional IT Hubs to train youth in software development.
Implementing community-led security initiatives in partnership with state agencies.

impact.section_sub: Real projects delivering tangible results for the people of Zamfara State.

page.hero_desc: We don't just talk about development; we build it. Explore the projects that have transformed communities across Zamfara.

programs.section_sub: Initiatives designed to empower, educate, and elevate our people.

page.hero_desc: Discover ongoing initiatives designed to provide skills, health, and economic stability.
page.empty: No programs found for this category.

testimonials.title: Voices from the Community
testimonials.subtitle: Don't just take our word for it. Hear from the people whose lives have been impacted.

news.section_sub: News, announcements, and insights from the campaign trail.

page.hero_desc: Stay informed on our latest activities, policy announcements, and community engagements.
page.empty: No articles found in this category.

page.hero_desc: Moments from the campaign trail, community meetings, and impactful projects.

volunteer.title: Join the Movement
volunteer.subtitle: We cannot do this alone. Be part of the change by volunteering your time, skills, or voice to help us build a better Zamfara.

page.hero_desc: Real change requires collective action. We need your energy, your skills, and your passion.
page.why_desc: Volunteering with the campaign is more than just politics; it is a commitment to the future of our state. We are building a grassroots network of change-makers.
page.benefit_community_desc: Work alongside passionate people who want the best for Zamfara.
page.benefit_voice_desc: Have a direct impact on policies and programs being developed.
page.benefit_change_desc: See the tangible results of your efforts in the lives of others.
page.form_success: Welcome to the team! We have received your details and our volunteer coordinator will reach out to you shortly.

page.hero_desc: Have a question, suggestion, or want to invite Hon. Suleiman to your community? We're here to listen.
page.form_success: Thank you for reaching out. We will get back to you as soon as possible.

footer.tagline: Leadership rooted in service. Building opportunities for every community in Zamfara State under the Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC).
footer.newsletter_sub: Stay updated with our latest community programs and initiatives.
